overview: I built the capability surface for Claims Desk: 4 MCP tools, 2 Agent Skills, and a 12-claim Supabase registry deployed on Railway. I verified cross-client reads between Claude Code and claude.

keyPoints.title: 4 MCP tools, 2 Skills, 12 seed claims deployed
5 architectural decisions captured in first ADR
Stateless Streamable HTTP shipped live to Railway
Skills split: procedural vs. reference, not tools
Claude Code and claude.ai share one live registry
